metadata.author: E1 Design Agent
metadata.description: Design guidelines for the WayofDojo Admin Space redesign, focusing on ergonomics, hierarchy, and dark mode aesthetics.

sidebar.behavior: fixed h-screen left-0 top-0 z-40 hidden lg:block

sidebar.name: AdminSidebar
sidebar.description: Vertical navigation sidebar replacing horizontal tabs.

elements.name: LogoArea
elements.style: h-16 flex items-center px-6 border-b border-slate-800

elements.name: NavMenu
elements.item_style: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors

dashboard_widgets.name: DashboardWidgets
dashboard_widgets.description: Modular widgets for the main dashboard view.

types.layout: flex flex-col justify-between p-6 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl
types.visuals: Subtle gradient glow based on metric type (e.g., Amber for Users, Violet for XP)

types.layout: col-span-2 p-6 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl
types.content: Header with Date Range Picker, Recharts AreaChart/BarChart

types.layout: col-span-1 row-span-2 p-0 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden
types.content: List of recent actions. Each item: Avatar + Action Text + Time

data_table.name: AdminDataTable
data_table.description: High-density table for Users and Dojos.
features: Bulk Actions Bar (appears when rows selected)
data_table.header_cell: h-10 px-4 text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-800

page_header.name: PageHeader
page_header.description: Standard header for every admin page.
page_header.layout: flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-8
elements: Primary Action Button (bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 text-slate-950 font-semibold)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-400 or lighter on slate-900 backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-amber-500/50) on all interactive elements.

motion.micro_interactions: Button press scale (active:scale-95), Link hover color fade (duration-200).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Create the layout shell (Sidebar + Main Content Area).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Implement the Dashboard view with mock data widgets.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build the Data Table component for Users/Dojos.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Apply the 'WayofDojo' dark theme variables to Shadcn components.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
